name: Saltworks Water Conditioning
about: Saltworks is a family-run water conditioning company that's been keeping homes around Fairfield County in cleaner water for over five decades. We size, install, and service softeners — and we still pick up the phone.

hero_image.alt: A clear glass pitcher of water on a kitchen countertop.

visual_note: Cream + deep navy + copper trust-accent · sturdy humanist sans · trade photography (hands, equipment, in-the-truck).
